nasb.text: So Moab was in great fear because of the people, for they were numerous; and Moab was in dread of the sons of Israel.

esv.text: And Moab was in great dread of the people, because they were many. Moab was overcome with fear of the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 摩押人十分懼怕這民，因為他們眾多；摩押人因以色列人的緣故，十分恐慌。

ccb.text: 又见他们人多势众，都惊恐万状，
